name: visual-lens-monorepo
description: VisualLens: AI-powered Visual Regression Testing Agent

scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install -r requirements.txt && playwright install chromium firefox webkit
scripts.start:backend: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
